SELECT
  FLAG.DV_REVENUE_FLG  ,              
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT   ,  
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE BK_SS_CD     ,                 
  AMT.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    , 
  AMT.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
  AMT.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   ,   
  KEY1.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD     ,         
  KEY1.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD  ,          
  KEY2.LINE_TYPE_CD  ,                
  NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT SPLIT_PCT  ,                   
  CAST(NCR.GL_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_DTM   ,                     
  CAST(NCR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_POSTED_DTM   ,              
  CAST(NCR.RULE_START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) RULE_START_DTM  ,              
  CASE WHEN NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG = 'F' THEN 'FORWARD' ELSE 'REVERSE' END FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ,
  NCR.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG LAST_RECORD_FLG,         
  KEY1.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD    ,    
  KEY1.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD    , 
  KEY2.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   , 
  KEY2.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,    
  'FOR REVENUE REPORTING'  REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE     ,       
  KEY2.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
  KEY1.SALES_ORDER_KEY    ,           
  KEY1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
  KEY1.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
  KEY1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,         
  KEY1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,        
  KEY2.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
  KEY1.AR_TRX_KEY  ,                  
  KEY1.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
  NCR.ORDER_NUMBER REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
  KEY1.PRODUCT_KEY   ,                
  KEY2.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD   ,      
  FLAG.DV_CHARGES_FLG    ,            
  (CASE WHEN ( FLAG.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y' 
     /* AND FLAG.DV_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y' */  /*satchinn: Commented as part   corp revenue flag changes  */
     /*AND FLAG.DV_CHARGES_FLG = 'N'  *//*pdubasi: commented the condition DV_CHARGES_FLG='N' as part of Q4FY14 LSS Release*/
     AND FLAG.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP = 'Y'
    )
   THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' 
   END
  ) DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG,
  FLAG.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG    , 
  FLAG.DV_MISC_FLG   ,                
  FLAG.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG ,      
  FLAG.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG    ,         
  FLAG.DV_SERVICE_FLG  ,              
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT   ,   
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  ,
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT  ,         
  AMT.DV_EXTENDED_QTY   ,            
  KEY1.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY     ,
  FLAG.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG   ,       
  KEY1.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM    ,      
  KEY1.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
  KEY1.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
  KEY1.SHIPPED_DT SHIPPED_DT,                  
  KEY2.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD    ,       
  KEY2.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
  KEY2.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME   ,     
  KEY2.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD   ,     
  FLAG.MAJOR_LINE_FLG   ,             
  KEY1.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
  KEY1.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  KEY1.SERVICE_TYPE_CD    ,           
  KEY1.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT, 
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT   ,      
  KEY2.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT   ,  
  KEY1.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD   ,    
  KEY1.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  , 
  KEY2.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   ,       
  KEY2.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY    ,       
  KEY1.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME   ,      
  KEY2.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD      ,      
  KEY1.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  , 
  KEY2.SALES_REP_NUM     ,            
  CASE WHEN NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE = 'O' THEN  NCR.GL_DT  ELSE CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE)  END DV_FISCAL_DT  ,
  NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
  NCR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  NCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
  NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  NCR.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
  CASE  WHEN EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL THEN -995
     ELSE EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
   END  as GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  KEY2.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY  /*ADDED FOR RT */
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_RT  NCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ADJ_KEY1_RT KEY1
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = KEY1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = KEY1.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ADJ_KEY2_RT KEY2
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = KEY2.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = KEY2.GLOBAL_NAME)  
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRNS_FLAG_RT FLAG
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = FLAG.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = FLAG.GLOBAL_NAME) 
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRNS_AMOUNT_RT AMT
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = AMT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = AMT.GLOBAL_NAME)
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVNGLA
    ON ( NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID =  EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
      AND EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
/*  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SORR
   ON NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
   AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = SORR.GLOBAL_NAME    */

   EX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  FROM
   $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_RT    EX

SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,

  COALESCE(CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
  CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
  CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
  
  CAST(
  COALESCE(
   CAST ( CAST((CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
      WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN  CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
       CASE WHEN NRT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
       ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
       END 
      ELSE 0.0000000
     END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
    CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
    COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
	,0.0000000)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, /*ADDED FOR RT*/
  
 0.0000000 AS DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT, /*ADDED FOR RT */
  
 0.0000000    DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 
 0 AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
  
 0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT, /*added for RT*/
 
  CAST
  (COALESCE(
   CAST(CAST(
   CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
   CASE WHEN NRT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.000000 
    ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))  END AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
   CAST(COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))     DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT /*ADDED FOR RT*/
  
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_RT NCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
   
   /*added for RTE*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT
ON (NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY)

  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
   ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NRT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)

  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
   ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE          
   AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
   AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
   AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
   ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
   AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
   AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
   AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)

UNION ALL

SELECT
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,

 COALESCE(CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
 CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
 
   CAST(
  COALESCE(
   CAST ( CAST((CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
      WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN  CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
       CASE WHEN NRT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
       ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
       END 
      ELSE 0.0000000
     END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
    CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
    COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
	,0.0000000)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, /*ADDED FOR RT AND NEED TO DISCUSS*/
 
 0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT, /*added for RT*/
 
 0.0000000    DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT, /*added for RT*/
   
 0 AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY, /*Added for RT*/
 
 0 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT, /*added for RT*/

   CAST
  (COALESCE(
   CAST(CAST(
   CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
   CASE WHEN NRT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.000000 
    ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))  END AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
   CAST(COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))/100,0.0000000)  AS DECIMAL(26,7))     DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT /*ADDED FOR RT*/
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_RT NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  
     /*added for RTE*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT
ON (NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY)
  
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
  ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NRT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
  ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE 
  AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
  AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
  ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 

 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
   WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
   AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   /*CASE WHEN NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' OR NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'Y'
   ELSE NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END DV_REVENUE_FLG,*/
   CASE WHEN (NSOLN.SS_CODE = 'CG' AND NSORDTV.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y') OR (NSORDTV.SS_CODE <> 'CG')   THEN  CASE WHEN NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' OR NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END 
   ELSE CASE WHEN NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' OR NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END END
 as DV_REVENUE_FLG,  /*     added as part of Cf LSS CR post Q3FY15: If Order got created in old 11i system then flag will be derived based on order table otherwise if order gets created in new CG system, then flag will be derived from order line table*/
 
   CASE  WHEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID='SERVICE'  THEN 
    CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END
    ELSE 'N' 
    END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
  'N' AS  DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, /*N for Revenue Transfer*/
   CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
  'N' AS DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,     /*N for Revenue Transfer*/
   CASE WHEN NCA.ERP_REVENUE_CUSTOMER_FLAG = 'I' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END  DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,

   /*-7777 MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , commented as a part of RTEQ1FY15*/
   CASE WHEN NSOL.SS_CODE='QTC' THEN -9999
   WHEN NSOL.SS_CODE='BV' THEN -8888
   ELSE  -7777 
   END AS MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
  NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(32) ) as SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
  NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
  -999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
  NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  NULL  BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) SHIPPED_DT,
  CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) AS CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT
  FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_RT NCR
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA
  ON NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON NRA.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_KEY)
   /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
  ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SATL.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL1
  ON (NATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
 /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
  ON ( CASE WHEN NRA.ATTRBTN_CD='STANDALONE' THEN NRA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE NRA.DV_ATTRBTN_PRNT_SLSORD_LN_KEY
  END)=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY/*modified the join as a part RTE Q1FY15 by sabanil */
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON (NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
   ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)  
AND NRA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'ERP'
UNION ALL
SELECT
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  /*'Revenue Transfer Auto'  ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,  */ ---commented as a part of FMV_DECFY15
   CASE WHEN NRA.RU_MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD='MANUAL' THEN 'Revenue Transfer Auto - Manual' Else 'Revenue Transfer Auto - System' END AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD, --Added as a part of FMV_DECFY15
   NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
   NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
   -7777 SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
   NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 
 
 
  /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 /*NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,*/
 CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 END as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
   NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   -7777 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   NAT.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
 /* MODIFIED AS A PART OF Q2FY18 PRMADDAL*/
   NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   NP.ITEM_KEY  PRODUCT_KEY,
   -9980  as DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY ,  
   CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(50) ) SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM, 
   'XAAS_ADJ' TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
   NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
   -7777  MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
   'UNKNOWN' DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
   CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(32) ) SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
   'UNKNOWN' DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
   -999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
   'UNKNOWN' SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
   -7777 BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) SHIPPED_DT,
   CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) AS CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_RT NCR 
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA
  ON NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON NRA.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_KEY)
  /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
  ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SATL.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL1
  ON (NATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
 /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
     WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
     AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
  AND NRA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'XAAS'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  /*'Revenue Transfer Auto'  ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,  */ ---commented as a part of FMV_DECFY15
  CASE WHEN NRA.RU_MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD='MANUAL' THEN 'Revenue Transfer Auto - Manual' Else 'Revenue Transfer Auto - System' END AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD, --Added as a part of FMV_DECFY15
  NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
  -7777 AS SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
  NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 /*NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,*/
 CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
             ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 END as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 
  NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 /*-7777 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , commented as a part of RTEQ1FY15*/
 -7777 AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  NAT.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
  NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,   
  -9980 as DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_KEY ,
  CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(50) ) as SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
   'XAAS_ADJ' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
   /*-7777 MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , commented as a part of RTEQ1FY15*/
  -7777 AS MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
  'UNKNOWN' DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(32) ) as SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
  'UNKNOWN' DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
  -999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
  'UNKNOWN' SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  -7777 BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) SHIPPED_DT,
  CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) AS CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT
  FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_RT NCR
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA
  ON NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON NRA.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_KEY)
   /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
  ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SATL.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL1
  ON (NATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
 /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
 
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
 AND NRA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'XAAS'

 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 /*commented for RT
 NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE LINE_TYPE_CD  ,*/

 NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   ,

 NCR.FISCAL_ID DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
 NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
 NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
  /*-7777 AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY, commented as a part of RTEQ1FY15 */
  CASE WHEN NATL.SS_CODE='QTC' THEN -9999
  WHEN NATL.SS_CODE='BV' THEN -8888
  ELSE -7777
  END  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,   
 EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
  -999 AS SK_GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT,
  /*-7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY, commented as a part of RTEQ1FY15 */
  CASE WHEN NATL.SS_CODE='QTC' THEN -9999
  WHEN NATL.SS_CODE='BV' THEN -8888
  ELSE -7777
  END  AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD ,
 NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER SALES_REP_NUM,
 CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'REV' THEN  'GL'     
  /*COMMENTED FOR RTE CASE WHEN ( SUBSTR(SORR.NAME,1,8)='VARIABLE' OR UPPER(SORR.NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' ) THEN 'GL' ELSE  'INV_GL' END */
 ELSE 'INV'
 END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
 EVNGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 NULL AS INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME,  
 NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY /*ADDED FOR RT */
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_RT NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  NFM
    ON ( NCR.FISCAL_ID=NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA
 ON NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON NRA.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
/*INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SORR      
  ON  (SORR.RULE_ID =NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID
  AND SORR.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )*/
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
  ON (NCR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT )
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EVNGLA
